text:
A Turkish shooter who won silver at theOlympicsinParishas spoken out after he sent the internet into meltdown because of his unique, relaxed style.

Yusuf Dikec produced an impressive display in the 10-metre air pistol alongside teammate Sevval Ilayda Tarhan on Wednesday to claim second place.

But it was the 51-year-old’s extremely laid back approach to the event that really caught the eye of viewers.

Pictured in a T-shirt with his hand in his pocket and no eye protection as he fired his gun during the contest, Dikec quickly went viral onsocial media.

Some joked he looked like a random guy off the street, rather than an Olympic athlete, while others even commented on hislikeness to a movie hitman-type character.

Competitors typically wear protective gear, such as his partner Tarhan who donned ear defenders and a visor.

But Dikec, who is no amateur and was taking part in his fifth Olympics, has revealed the reason why he doesn’t bother with many add ons.

Turkey sent a 51-year-old dude with no specialized lenses, eye cover, or ear protection, and secured the silver medalpic.twitter.com/fLxTUxMd2j

‘I never needed that equipment,’ he told Haber Turk. ‘I am a natural. A natural shooter.

‘That’s why I don’t use many accessories.’

The retired non-commissioned officer in Turkey’s gendarmerie also elaborated on his casual technique and explained that while he may looked relaxed, his silver medal didn’t come without hard work and dedication.

‘My shooting technique is one of the rare shooting techniques in the world,’ he said.

‘I shoot with both eyes open. Even the referees are surprised by this.

‘This year we prepared a lot and worked a lot. This success belongs to all of Turkey.’

Dikec, who did actually wear small yellow ear plugs for some level of protection, added: ‘Success doesn’t come with your hands in your pockets.’

The Olympic#shootingsportstars we didnât know we needed.ð°ð· Kim Yeji ð¤ Yusuf DikeÃ§ ð¹ð·pic.twitter.com/gfkyGjFg4I

He wasn’t the only pistol shooter to rise to fame at this year’s Olympics asSouth Korea’s Kim Yeji also took social media by storm for her ‘main character energy’.

The official Olympics account posted a picture of both Kim and Dikec yesterday, saying: ‘The Olympic #shootingsport stars we didn’t know we needed.’

Kim also won silver in the women’s 10-metre pistol event on Sunday, behind teammate Oh Ye Jin, who won gold.

title: Viral Turkish Olympics shooter explains why he doesn't need any equipment | Metro News
description: Turkish shooting sensation Yusuf Dikec has revealed all after the 51-year-old won silver in the 10-metre air pistol shooting event in Paris 2024.
